Phase 4.5 — fixed line slices (18 splits)

Each strip below used to be a single crop (two-or-more text lines fused). The red line(s) mark where the new over-segmentation guard now splits it into separate single-line crops. Drop-cap initials stay attached to their own line; ornament bands are non-text.
